mechanics.excerpt: Though the people accepted warrior rule in the years following the Exodus Civil War; in many regards is Iittle differ- ent from the Inner Sphere' neo-feudalism Clan civilians work to support tne military: while the military protects the civilians The few civilians unable t0 accept this system have dropped out and formed an outcast group; known variously as the dark or bandit caste_ With most civilian efforts going support the warrior caste life for civilians can be hard- ~proportionately more than in the Inner Sphere.
